selection_method.description: Deterministic moderate-strength EMRI subset for LISA, Taiji, and TianQin A/E/T response runs; excludes very nearby/high-proxy sources that dominate the summed time series.
selection_method.diversity_rule: Select at most one source per original catalog file within each catalog year when possible.

ranking_proxy.selection: Within each year, choose 10 sources near quantiles 0.15..0.85 of the moderate-proxy pool.
